title: Hunting rifle crossbow
description: This resource pack gives the Minecraft crossbow a fresh, high-quality 3D model that feels right at home in vanilla gameplay.
body:
# 🎯 Hunting rifle crossbow — Vanilla-Friendly 3D Model Pack
Tired of the same old vanilla crossbow look? This pack gives it a **fresh, detailed 3D model** that fits seamlessly with Minecraft’s style — no gameplay changes, no mods, no hassle.

### ✨ Features

- Works as a standalone resource pack
- Vanilla Minecraft look and feel retained
- Simple install — just enable the pack
- Perfect for players who want a subtle visual upgrade without altering mechanics.

### 📦 Installation

1. Download the pack
1. Open Minecraft
1. Go to **Options** → **Resource Packs**
1. Enable _Hunting rifle crossbow_
1. Press **F3** + **T** to reload

### 💬 Notes:

This pack **only updates the crossbow visuals** — it does not change sounds, mechanics, or performance.

Use it with any vanilla or minimal mod setup!
